tools_additions.tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 View Repair Batch
tools_additions.trigger_conditions: Use after WBS09 panel-readback reports saved Airtable view filter/sort gaps and the operator wants a dry-run plan or approved batch mutation repair.
tools_additions.input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR. Accepts Mode DryRun or Apply, a target list file or AllGapTargets, the WBS09 manifest, browser/user profile parameters, and in Apply mode the confirmation token APPLY_WBS09_VIEW_REPAIR_BATCH.
tools_additions.output_contract: Writes view_repair_batch_rollup.json, view_repair_batch_plan.json, per-target reports, logs, optional screenshots/DOM evidence, and a ChatGPT-friendly ZIP when run through the staging runner.
tools_additions.safety_preconditions: DryRun is default and read-only. Apply mode requires explicit token, interactive re-entry of token, live preflight, per-target verification, and skips unsupported/source-intent cases instead of guessing. Does not create/delete/rename views or touch Airtable records/schema.
